name: Dicker Data Limited
analysis: DDR's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 3% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$11.7600. Trade idea: entry A$12.2000, stop A$10.7910, target A$16.4270 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
